# Paths to exclude from secret scanning
# (test fixtures, example configs, lock files, .git internals)

# .git internals are not committed source — TruffleHog BASE64-decodes
# strings in .git/config and false-positives on remote URLs.
^\.git/

node_modules/
.env.example
package-lock.json
*.lock
__pycache__/
*.pyc
coverage.xml
